description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a rectangular footprint and a gable roof. The main structure is flanked by two darker, smaller outbuildings or garages on either side, all set on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway. The central building is predominantly light gray or white, with clean lines and a simple facade, while the outbuildings are dark gray or black, providing a strong visual contrast. The front of the bungalow includes a small covered porch area with visible support posts and a recessed entryway. Windows are arranged in a linear, asymmetrical pattern along the sides, with larger openings facing the front and rear. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, flanked by two dark outbuildings, featuring a minimalist facade and a small covered porch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, light-colored main building with a gable roof, flanked by two dark outbuildings and a visible porch entry.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, and the symmetrical arrangement of the outbuildings on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the linear arrangement of windows and the rear outbuilding, with the main structure's clean lines visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow and the outbuildings, with the gable roof and minimal window openings.
